structured_content.response:
The process `J09C` has been executed end-to-end:

- Filtered `decision_table` for tours starting with `J09C` into `J09C_temp`.
- Added and populated `ENTSCHEIDUNG` per HAUS:
  - `< 3` EQUNR ‚Üí `KSA`
  - `‚â• 3` EQUNR ‚Üí `EVU`
- Joined with `EABLG` (via `ANLAGE`‚Üî`Installation`) and then with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` (via `EQUNR`).
- Detected that sales customer data exists (`sales_customer_data_not_empty = TRUE`) and therefore used `SALES_MASTER` as the authoritative source (falling back to `NET_MASTER` only where sales fields are null).
- Exported the final data to `J09C.csv` with exactly these columns:

  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

  File path:
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_base_rule_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09C_seed_4012/J09C.csv`

- Sent an email with the CSV attached to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped the temporary tables `J09C_temp`, `J09C_temp_enriched`, and `J09C_final`.

Process `J09C` is complete.

kwargs.content:
Process `J09C` has been executed successfully end-to-end.

Summary of what was done:
- Filtered the `decision_table` for tours starting with `J09C` into `J09C_temp`.
- Computed `ENTSCHEIDUNG` per `HAUS`:
  - `< 3` distinct `EQUNR` ‚Üí `KSA`
  - `‚â• 3` distinct `EQUNR` ‚Üí `EVU`
- Joined with `EABLG` (`ANLAGE` ‚Üî `Installation`), then with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` via `EQUNR`.
- Since sales customer data was present, `SALES_MASTER` was used as primary source, with fallback to `NET_MASTER` where needed.
- Exported the final dataset to `J09C.csv` with columns:

  `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

- File stored at:  
  `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_base_rule_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09C_seed_4012/J09C.csv`
- Email sent with CSV attached to: `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Temporary tables `J09C_temp`, `J09C_temp_enriched`, and `J09C_final` were dropped.

If you‚Äôd like, I can:
- Extract or transform specific data from `J09C.csv`, or
- Help define or run a similar process for another tour ID.
